text:
{"revised_text":"Dear Aisha binti Rahman,

It is my pleasure to confirm that your application for the Yayasan UM Scholarship for Session 2025/2026 has been approved.

We were impressed by both your strong academic record (CGPA 3.80) and the clarity of purpose you set out in your application. The award covers the standard tuition portion under the Yayasan UM B40 pathway and is subject to the conditions outlined in the offer pack the Bursary will send you separately.

If circumstances change before you confirm acceptance — for example, if you are awarded a parallel scholarship that would affect your eligibility — please write to the Scholarship Office so we can advise you on next steps. Should you wish to appeal any aspect of this decision, the Yayasan UM appeal procedure is available within 14 days of this letter (see HEP §11.3).

We look forward to supporting your studies.

Warm regards,
Yayasan UM Scholarship Office
Universiti Malaya","brief_explanation":"Softened the tone, added the appeal-window paragraph referencing HEP §11.3, kept all factual details (name, programme, CGPA, pathway) intact."}
